## Checklist

- [ ] I checked that this is not already listed.
- [ ] I checked that there is no duplicate open PR for this project.
- [ ] The link points to an official source.
- [ ] The description is concise and factual.
- [ ] The entry uses the existing table format.
- [ ] The pricing label follows the surrounding section style.
- [ ] The URL has no UTM, referral, or affiliate parameters.
- [ ] This PR changes only the relevant lines.
- [ ] I have disclosed any affiliation below.
